productDisplayName: Royal Diadem Green Earring & Pendant Set
description: Style NoteEthnic outfits require attention to detail when you come to choose which jewellery set is most fitting to complete your look. This set from royal diadem will brilliantly set off any green tones in your outfit - or wear it as a focus piece over white.Product Detailsjewellery setnecklace: Green beaded chain with an adjustable hook clasp at the back, golden design detail at regular intervals, tear drop shaped green pendant with golden casing and golden design detail and small beaded hangings from the pendantEar rings: Tear drop shaped green ear ring with a green ear ring with a golden casing, beaded detail dangling from the tear drop and push closure at the backMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of the necklace: 36 mmLength of earing: 30 mm
